summary: The Unified Layer is proposed as a central interoperable platform by RBI to streamline the delivery of government benefits and subsidies via Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC). This platform addresses the current challenge of government agencies needing to integrate separately with multiple banks, which leads to increased effort and complexity. The Unified Layer will provide standardized APIs for data upload, lookup, update, and transaction initiation, facilitating secure, controlled, and auditable information exchange between government agencies and banks for beneficiary data, scheme details, and fund unlock requests.

apis.name: Beneficiary Management
apis.description: APIs for government agencies to create and manage DBT beneficiary eligibility data in the Unified Layer, and for banks to query this data for MIN-KYC wallet eligibility.

operations.summary: Government uploads new DBT beneficiary details to the Unified Layer.

bodySchema.description: Details of the DBT beneficiary, referred to as Part A (Beneficiary Data).

200.description: Beneficiary data successfully stored/updated in the Unified Layer. Response includes UUID.

operations.summary: Government modifies the eligibility status of an existing DBT beneficiary.

pathParams.name: uuid
pathParams.description: Unique identifier of the beneficiary record, assigned by the Unified Layer.

bodySchema.description: Only the status field is allowed for modification.

errors.description: Invalid request or UUID not found.

operations.summary: Banks query the Unified Layer to confirm beneficiary eligibility for MIN-KYC wallets.

queryParams.name: beneficiary_aadhaar_hash
queryParams.description: SHA256 hashed Aadhaar number of the beneficiary. One identifier type is mandatory.

queryParams.name: other_id_type
queryParams.description: Type of other ID (e.g., PAN, Passport). Requires 'other_id' to be present. One identifier type is mandatory.

queryParams.name: other_id
queryParams.description: Value of the other ID. Requires 'other_id_type' to be present. One identifier type is mandatory.

queryParams.name: beneficiary_mobile
queryParams.description: Mobile number of the beneficiary. One identifier type is mandatory.

bodySchema.description: No request body for GET operation.

200.description: Eligibility response for the matched beneficiary record.

errors.description: Invalid query parameters or no identifier provided.
Beneficiary not found for the provided identifier(s).

apis.name: Scheme Information Management
apis.description: APIs for government agencies to upload and modify DBT scheme-related information (pCBDC parameters), and for banks to fetch this information to create CBDC rules.

operations.summary: Government uploads new DBT scheme related information to the Unified Layer.

bodySchema.description: Details of the DBT scheme, referred to as Part B (PCBDC parameters). Unique combination: Scheme Code + Start Date.

200.description: Scheme details successfully stored/updated. Response includes UUID.

errors.description: Invalid scheme data or duplicate scheme_code + start_date combination.

operations.summary: Government modifies existing DBT scheme related information or requests deletion of a Rule ID.

pathParams.name: start_date
pathParams.description: Start date for the scheme version (YYYY-MM-DD).

bodySchema.description: Updated scheme details or instruction for rule ID deletion.

200.description: Scheme details or Rule ID status successfully updated.

errors.description: Invalid request or scheme_code + start_date not found.

operations.summary: Banks query the Unified Layer to fetch scheme construct details for creating CBDC rules.

queryParams.name: start_date
queryParams.description: Start date for the specific scheme version (YYYY-MM-DD). If omitted, all versions for the scheme_code are returned.

bodySchema.description: No request body for GET operation.

200.description: Scheme construct information as stored in the Unified Layer.

errors.description: Scheme not found for the provided scheme_code and/or start_date.

operations.summary: Government agencies retrieve Rule IDs created/updated by Banks for a given scheme.

queryParams.name: start_date
queryParams.description: Start date for the specific scheme version (YYYY-MM-DD). If omitted, all versions for the scheme_code are returned.

bodySchema.description: No request body for GET operation.

200.description: Scheme records including Rule IDs, as updated by banks.

errors.description: Scheme not found for the provided scheme_code and/or start_date.

operations.summary: Banks update the Rule ID field for a specific scheme record in the Unified Layer.

pathParams.name: uuid
pathParams.description: Unique identifier of the scheme record, assigned by the Unified Layer.

bodySchema.description: The Rule ID to be associated with the scheme record.

errors.description: Invalid request, UUID not found, or unauthorized update attempt.

apis.name: Fund Unlock Request (Government to Unified)
apis.description: API for Government to trigger unlock requests for CBDC funds routed to banks.

operations.summary: Government initiates an unlock request for beneficiary/merchant funds via the Unified Layer.

bodySchema.description: Fields for unlocking funds, referred to as Part C (Unlock Request).

200.description: Unlock request successfully received by Unified Layer.

bodySchema.message: Unlock request forwarded to relevant banks.

apis.name: Fund Unlock Request (Unified to Destination Banks)
apis.description: API exposed by Destination Banks, consumed by the Unified Layer, to receive unlock requests for CBDC funds.

operations.summary: Unified Layer routes an unlock request to the relevant Destination Bank.

bodySchema.description: Unlock request fields as received from the Government, referred to as Part C (Unlock Request).

200.description: Status response from the Destination Bank for the unlock request, referred to as Part C (Unlock Response).

errors.description: Invalid request or processing error at the bank.

apis.name: Check Transaction Status
apis.description: Meta API to check the status of a transaction between entities in case of timeout or uncertainty.

operations.summary: Checks the current status of a given transaction.

pathParams.name: transaction_id
pathParams.description: The unique identifier of the transaction to check.

bodySchema.description: No request body for GET operation.

200.description: Returns the status of the transaction.

apis.name: Heartbeat
apis.description: Meta API to check the operational status (heartbeat) between different entities.

operations.summary: Checks the health and availability of the service.

bodySchema.description: No request body for GET operation.

errors.description: Service is unavailable or experiencing issues.

dataModels.name: Beneficiary Data (Part A)
dataModels.description: Details of Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) beneficiaries used for eligibility checks for MIN-KYC wallets.

fields.name: uuid
fields.constraints: Unique identifier assigned by Unified Layer

fields.name: beneficiary_aadhaar_hash
fields.constraints: SHA256 hashed value of Aadhaar number. At least one identifier (Aadhaar hash, other ID, or mobile) must be present.

fields.name: other_id_type
fields.constraints: Type of other identification document (e.g., PAN, Passport). Requires 'other_id' field.

fields.name: other_id
fields.constraints: Value of the other identification document. Requires 'other_id_type' field.

fields.name: beneficiary_mobile
fields.constraints: Mobile number of the beneficiary. At least one identifier (Aadhaar hash, other ID, or mobile) must be present.

fields.name: status
fields.constraints: Eligibility status (Active/Inactive)

fields.name: eligible_till
fields.constraints: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) until which the beneficiary is eligible.

dataModels.name: Scheme Parameters (Part B - PCBDC parameters)
dataModels.description: Scheme-specific information and programmable CBDC (pCBDC) parameters, including rules and constraints.

fields.name: uuid
fields.constraints: Unique identifier assigned by Unified Layer
fields.source: Detailed approach - API for capturing scheme code

fields.name: scheme_code
fields.constraints: Unique code for the scheme. Forms a unique combination with 'start_date'.

fields.name: start_date
fields.constraints: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the scheme version starts. Forms a unique combination with 'scheme_code'.

fields.name: mcc
fields.constraints: Merchant Category Code.
fields.source: Detailed approach - Collecting scheme related information

fields.name: vpa
fields.constraints: Virtual Payment Address.
fields.source: Detailed approach - Collecting scheme related information

fields.name: geographic_parameters
fields.constraints: Geographic constraints (e.g., Lat/Long, buffer).
fields.source: Detailed approach - Collecting scheme related information

fields.name: other_controls
fields.constraints: Other scheme-specific controls and constraints.
fields.source: Detailed approach - Collecting scheme related information

fields.name: rule_id
fields.constraints: ID of the CBDC rule created by the bank. Updatable by banks.

fields.name: rule_creator_iin
fields.constraints: IIN of the bank that created/updated the 'rule_id'.

fields.name: rule_id_status
fields.constraints: Status of the Rule ID (Active/Inactive). Inactive for deletion requests.
fields.source: Detailed approach - Government changes - API for modification of scheme code

fields.name: type
fields.constraints: Used by Government for modification requests: '1' for scheme update, '2' for rule ID deletion.
fields.source: Detailed approach - Government changes - API for modification of scheme code

dataModels.name: Unlock Request (Part C)
dataModels.description: Request details for Government to trigger unlocking or locking of funds for beneficiaries/merchants.

fields.name: total_transactions_count
fields.constraints: Count of transactions included in the request.

fields.name: transactions
fields.constraints: List of individual unlock/lock transactions.

fields.name: transactions[].payee_info.identifier_type
fields.constraints: Type of payee identifier (hashed aadhar, mobile number, Other ID type).

fields.name: transactions[].payee_info.identifier_value
fields.constraints: Value of payee identifier.

fields.name: transactions[].payer_info.identifier_type
fields.constraints: Type of payer identifier (hashed aadhar, mobile number, Other ID type). Optional.

fields.name: transactions[].payer_info.identifier_value
fields.constraints: Value of payer identifier. Optional.

fields.name: transactions[].action
fields.constraints: Action to perform: 'Lock' or 'Unlock'.

dataModels.name: Unlock Response (Part C)
dataModels.description: Response details from banks to the Unified Layer for fund unlock/lock requests.

fields.name: total_transactions_count
fields.constraints: Count of transactions included in the response.

fields.name: transactions
fields.constraints: List of individual transaction responses.

fields.name: transactions[].response_status
fields.constraints: Status of the transaction: Success/Fail.

fields.name: transactions[].transaction_id
fields.constraints: Unique ID generated by the bank for the transaction.

fields.name: transactions[].additional_details_1
fields.constraints: Additional details or reject reason.

fields.name: transactions[].payee_info.identifier_type
fields.constraints: Type of payee identifier (hashed aadhar, mobile number, Other ID type).

fields.name: transactions[].payee_info.identifier_value
fields.constraints: Value of payee identifier.

fields.name: transactions[].payer_info.identifier_type
fields.constraints: Type of payer identifier (hashed aadhar, mobile number, Other ID type). Optional.

fields.name: transactions[].payer_info.identifier_value
fields.constraints: Value of payer identifier. Optional.

fields.name: transactions[].additional_details_1_txn
fields.constraints: Additional details specific to this transaction.

fields.name: transactions[].additional_details_2_txn
fields.constraints: Additional details specific to this transaction.

nonFunctional.security: All online requests will be routed through the Internet. Hashing logic (SHA256) for storing Aadhaar numbers. File uploads via UI will enforce maker-checker controls for security and auditability. The information shared under this document is highly confidential.
nonFunctional.observability: Meta APIs like 'Check Transaction' and 'Heartbeat' are provided to monitor transaction status and system health between entities (Government, Unified, Banks) in case of timeouts or for general operational checks.
